description: Declarative acceptance expectations for locally edited Confluence Cloud workspaces. A capability passes only after local storage, API verification, no-op dry-run, and browser ground truth all pass.

capabilities.description: Headings, inline emphasis, code, strike, underline, subscript, superscript, colors, alignment, indentation, quotation, and divider.
Nested ordered and unordered lists plus an incomplete task item.
Information, note, warning, and tip panels with a date, emoji, and inline status.
Nested expandable content and a Python code block.
Row and column spans plus a two-column page layout.

external-email-smart-links.actual_equals: All four link forms were present in the authenticated DOM.

internal-anchor-links.actual_equals: The internal page link was present and clicking the media anchor exposed the target section.

cross-page-excerpt.actual_equals: The rendered excerpt contained 'Campaign excerpt content available to another page.'

image-attachments.actual_equals: The PNG and caption were visible in the authenticated page.

pdf-preview-download.actual_equals: campaign-preview.pdf opened as a 2 KB document with Download and no load error.

video-playback-download.actual_equals: campaign-video.mp4 opened as 2.6 MB, played a 5-second H.264/AAC stream, and exposed seek, volume, speed, fullscreen, and Download controls.

audio-playback-download.actual_equals: campaign-audio.mp3 opened, exposed a two-second playback timeline and Download, and reported no load error.

csv-preview-download.actual_equals: The preview contained the header 'capability,format,result', the expected smart-link row, and Download.

text-revision-preview-download.actual_equals: The preview showed the revision-two sentence from attachment version 2 and Download.

capabilities.description: External HTTPS, email, inline Smart Link, and block Smart Link forms.
Existing page, undefined-page, section-anchor, and anchor macro links.

visible_markers: Open the text and structure laboratory

capabilities.description: An excerpt-include macro resolves reusable content from another campaign page.

page_references: Confluence 8h Lab — Macros and Dynamic Content 2026-07-12
visible_markers: The following macro consumes the excerpt published by the macros laboratory:

capabilities.description: PNG, JPEG, and animated GIF attachments preserve storage controls and are separately browser-verified for representative rendering, geometry, and animation; functional accessibility is verified through ac:alt on a dedicated page.

alt: JPEG conversion of the campaign architecture diagram

visible_markers: PNG attachment with explicit storage controls.

capabilities.description: PDF, MP4, MP3, CSV, and plain-text attachment links open their tested previews or playback surfaces and expose Download controls; returned download bytes were not verified.
Table of contents, page tree, and children macros render dynamic navigation.
Attachments, content-by-label, recent updates, history, and contributors macros scan page collections dynamically.
Excerpt, page-properties, and page-properties-report macros support reusable and aggregated content.

visible_markers: Campaign excerpt content available to another page.

capabilities.description: Live search, task report, labels list, and popular labels macros explore many pages.
Profile picture, user profile, and external widget macros retain their dynamic parameters.
Title, global labels, and page content state can change while parent and space remain stable.
A user mention and inline status remain distinct from page-level metadata.
Read-only representations, restrictions, parent, space, and optimistic locks remain verifiable after upload.

visible_markers: Restrictions, ADF, rendered view, parent ID, space ID, and attachment locks must not be silently changed by a batch edit.

capabilities.description: An AI-assisted local edit preserves complex structure, dynamic macros, links, API representations, exact no-op convergence, and rendered browser behavior.
A direct PI filesystem edit through OpenRouter preserves locally authored macros, decisions, nested structure, tasks, tables, layouts, links, exact no-op convergence, and rendered behavior.

visible_markers: Decision: accept the direct OpenRouter edit.

rendered-page.actual_equals: The page title and final acceptance marker were present in the authenticated page.

inline-formatting.actual_equals: All configured inline and block formatting markers rendered without a conversion error.

rich-table.actual_equals: The complete three-column verification matrix was visible with the expected merged cells and values.

capabilities.description: Native-editor H1-H6 hierarchy, inline marks, alignment, quotation, preformatted text, hard break, and divider survive storage round-trip and render correctly.
Nested ordered and unordered lists, assigned/due and completed tasks, merged table cells, mentions, dates, emoji, and inline status remain functional.
One-, two-, three-, sidebar-, four-, and five-column native layouts retain all eight sections and twenty-two columns with measured browser geometry.

rendered-page.actual_equals: The title, body, labels, and final acceptance marker were visible.

remote-preflight-info-panel.actual_equals: The blue information panel rendered with the exact local body text.

capabilities.description: The integrated asynchronous remote-render preflight completes before mutation, then the accepted info panel, four-column layout, link, and table survive API and browser verification.

visible_markers: Remote renderer accepted this macro body before mutation.

rendered-page.actual_equals: The heading, explanatory text, image, and caption were visible.

capabilities.description: Current Page Tree Search, Blog Posts, Content Report Table, Include Content, User List, and Decision Report forms survive local storage editing and execute in the authenticated tenant.
Create from Template launches a configured meeting-notes draft and the current iFrame form loads and plays its exact embed.
A UI-created Roadmap Planner remains opaque and functional while a locally authored Table of Contents Zone body generates top and bottom navigation links.

Two editor-created synced-block nodes retain their resource identities while a locally revised source body and table render in the authenticated page; REST view placeholders are not treated as dynamic truth.

visible_markers: Reusable synchronized guidance from the live fixture.

capabilities.description: Localized Cards and Carousel options are present in the current editor, but both stop at an operation-bound Premium-trial gate and no storage constructor is inferred.

visible_markers: Cards and Carousel were offered by the editor but required a Premium trial on this tenant.

capabilities.description: The tenant-native PDF and Excel macros retain their exact attachment references, render the PDF, and expose the Verification worksheet with calculated totals in the authenticated browser.

visible_markers: The authenticated browser must render the exact PDF page and the Verification worksheet with calculated totals.

capabilities.description: Authenticated editor probes reproduce the tenant-specific Jira and Assets access gates and record that the es-ES catalog returned no exact option match for the queried English integration labels.

visible_markers: Integration gates observed in this tenant
Jira Activities reported that the account has no accessible Jira sites.
Jira Charts requested an administrator-managed Confluence-to-Jira connection.
Assets reported that the account does not have access to the requested content.
Activity Stream, Team Calendars, Jira Timeline, Word, and PowerPoint were not offered as insertable core elements in the current editor catalog.
